title: hedyotis grandiflora
intro: Hedyotis grandiflora, also known as the Chinese hedyotis or Ru-Ye, is a plant species in the family Rubiaceae that is native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which make it useful for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Hedyotis grandiflora include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, which are often used to support the immune system and promote overall well-being.
